channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: Redact or Keep? A Fully Local AI Cascade for Educational Dialogue De-Identification
item.description: arXiv:2606.18372v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Educational dialogue is a valuable but sensitive resource for research: the same transcripts that capture authentic learning often capture personally identifiable information (PII) entangled with curricular content, where "Riemann" may refer to a real...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, research, LLM, arxiv, large language model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: JetFlow: Breaking the Scaling Ceiling of Speculative Decoding with Parallel Tree Drafting
item.description: arXiv:2606.18394v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them in parallel, but it faces a scaling limitation: increasing the draft budget improves speed only when acceptance remains hi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, LLM, arxiv, large language model, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: ProfiLLM: Utility-Aligned Agentic User Profiling for Industrial Ride-Hailing Dispatch
item.description: arXiv:2606.18803v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Bringing Large Language Models (LLMs) into industrial ride-hailing dispatch as semantic feature extractors over platform-scale behavioral logs is a compelling but under-explored data systems problem. Production matching pipelines remain dominated by s...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> fine-tuning, LLM, arxiv, product, large language model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, prompt engineering, large language model, tool, platform | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, model, API, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: A Link between Shock-wave Theory and Symmetry-reduced Stochastic Gradient Descent for Artificial Neural Networks
item.description: arXiv:2606.18303v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a mathematically explicit link between shock-wave theory and the symmetry-quotiented learning dynamics of stochastic gradient descent, drawing on differential geometry, Lie group theory, and fluid mechanics. Specifically, after quotienting ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> transformer, framework, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: code-review-graph - Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: R2D-RL: A RoboCup 2D Soccer Environment for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
item.description: arXiv:2606.18786v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robot soccer is a challenging testbed for multi-agent reinforcement learning because it combines partial observability, cooperative and adversarial interaction, sparse rewards, and long-horizon tactical behavior. RoboCup 2D Soccer Simulation (RCSS2D) ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, platform, API, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (Hugging Face Blog)
